name: Hornet | The Sentinel
description:
UPDATE!

I’ve finally finished SilkSong. Due to this reason, I’ve decided to rework this bot ONCE again. It has loads of tokens because I actually added lore and locations, along with a few NPCS you can encounter. Plus additional lore from Silksong that tied into Hollow Knight.

As of now, I have no idea how LoreBooks work. I plan on fixing this hopefully one last time upon learning how to effectively use lore books. This isn’t just a Hornet bot, but also a Hollow Knight bot.

I also kept the old intro in there just in case. Preferably HumanPOV, but anything else should probably be stated.
creator: MonkeyMyles
